overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game. The player character walks through a dark neon-lit back alley, enters a derelict building, ascends a graffiti-covered stairwell, and emerges onto a rooftop lounge overlooking a sprawling futuristic cityscape with towering holographic billboards and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark back alley with building entrance

events.description: player opens the metal door to enter the building

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit alley toward the building entrance

notable_agents.action: person in neon yellow shirt standing by the entrance door

entered.detail: tall concrete walls of the alleyway with weathered textures
dark colored van parked along the alley wall
metal door with illuminated frame and graffiti markings
colorful holographic advertisements visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow dark alley at night, with the player approaching a building entrance. A person in a yellow shirt stands near the door. The player reaches the door and opens it to enter the building.

events.description: player begins ascending the concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: entering the building and walking through the graffiti-covered corridor toward the stairwell

notable_agents.action: person with blue hair and purple skirt climbing the stairs ahead

entered.detail: walls covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
stairwell leading upward with metal handrails

segments.scene_description: Inside the building, the player moves through a narrow hallway with walls covered in graffiti. The lighting is dim and greenish from fluorescent tubes. The player approaches and begins climbing a concrete stairwell, following an NPC ahead.

events.description: passing through smoky haze illuminated by overhead fluorescent tubes
reaching the top of stairs and approaching the exit door to rooftop

agents.ego_description: climbing multiple flights of stairs in the dimly lit concrete stairwell

entered.detail: long fluorescent tubes casting green light through fog
metal door at the top of the stairwell leading outside

segments.scene_description: The player continues ascending the stairwell, which is filled with green fluorescent lighting and atmospheric smoke. The walls are covered in graffiti. The player reaches the top floor and approaches a door leading to the rooftop.

scene_state.functional_zone: building rooftop with HVAC equipment overlooking city

events.description: exiting the stairwell onto the open rooftop with city view
turning toward the rooftop lounge area with canopy

agents.ego_description: emerging onto the rooftop and walking past ventilation equipment toward the lounge area

entered.detail: concrete rooftop with puddles and debris
large ventilation boxes and industrial equipment
towering skyscrapers with bright holographic billboards and neon signs
metal railings along the rooftop edge

segments.scene_description: The player exits onto a wide rooftop with an expansive view of the neon-lit city skyline. The camera moves past HVAC units and safety railings, turning toward a makeshift lounge area with canopy tents visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop lounge with neon graffiti and city overlook

events.description: discovering the lounge area with illuminated 'BROKEN' graffiti sign
approaching the rooftop edge to look down at the street below

agents.ego_description: exploring the rooftop lounge and looking over the edge at the city street traffic below

entered.detail: large graffiti text 'BROKEN' illuminated by cyan neon tubes
wooden table with bottles and glowing lamp
worn leather sofa under canopy umbrella
view down to the wet city streets with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The player explores a makeshift rooftop lounge featuring a prominent 'BROKEN' neon sign, a table with drinks, and seating under canopy umbrellas. The camera then moves to the rooftop edge, revealing a view of the wet city streets and traffic below against the backdrop of towering neon skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, dark alleyway into the expansive, neon-lit heights of a futuristic cityscape. It begins by approaching a building entrance in a narrow night alley, passing a person in a yellow shirt before stepping inside. The environment then shifts into a dim, greenish interior where the camera moves through graffiti-covered hallways and ascends a smoke-filled concrete stairwell. As the player reaches the top floor and exits through a final door, the cramped space opens up into a wide rooftop featuring HVAC units and a makeshift lounge with canopy tents and a glowing BROKEN neon sign. The movement finally leads to the rooftop edge, revealing a sweeping vista of wet city streets and towering skyscrapers beneath a vibrant neon sky.
